---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

### Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

### Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

### Actual behavior
What actually happened.

### Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain.

### Environment
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **Editor:** (e.g., VS Code 1.90, Cursor, Windsurf, Kiro)
- **API Studio version:** (e.g., 1.4.58)
- **Protocol:** (HTTP / GraphQL / WebSocket / gRPC)

### Additional context
Any other relevant information (error messages, logs, etc.)
